name: opencode-hexz
description: HEXZ — OpenCode upgrade layer. Anti-slop, security scanning, design scaffolds, web search, image handling, plugin marketplace.

scripts.build: bun build src/hexz.ts --outfile dist/hexz.js --target bun --external bun --external capture-website --external tesseract.js && bun build src/hexz-mimo.ts --outfile dist/hexz-mimo.js --target node --external capture-website --external tesseract.js
scripts.postinstall: npx puppeteer browsers install chrome 2>/dev/null || true
